title: Funding Opportunities and Requests for Information
description: Keep up with GDO funding and grant opportunities.
text:
Below is a list of funding opportunities, notices of intent (NOIs), and requests for information (RFIs) available through the Grid Deployment Office. New opportunities will be added here as they become available.
